{{Quote|Freeze! Don't move!|This stormtrooper to Leia Organa and Han Solo|<ref name="RotJ" />}}
A '''stormtrooper''' participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He shot [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] as she and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] attempted to enter the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]]. The [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] held Organa and Solo at gunpoint along with another; both stormtroopers were subsequently killed by Organa's [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] pistol.
